description:
Set up branch protection rules on `main` for clarity-house-press/wc-mcp.

## Rules to apply (via `gh` CLI or GitHub rulesets API)
- Require PRs before merging
- Squash merge only
- Required status checks: `build`, `test`, `format`, `audit`, `CodeRabbit AI Code Review`
- Dismiss stale reviews on new commits
- Require conversation resolution before merge
- No bypass for admins

## Acceptance Criteria
- Direct pushes to main are rejected
- PRs require all checks to pass
- Squash is the only merge strategy available
title: Configure branch protection on main
